response.justification: Candidate has 25+ years of broad software engineering experience but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. There is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows beyond a brief stint at National Instruments (Dec 2000 – Jun 2001), no SQL Server or Oracle experience, and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background. The recent profile is heavily web/full-stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) rather than C++ on Windows for financial systems.
strengths: Extensive 25+ year software engineering career with strong fundamentals
Some early C/C++ experience at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI
Solid communication skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience (only ~6 months in 2000-2001)
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; SQL exposure appears limited to MySQL/MongoDB
Zero fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience

key_factors.factor: No fixed income or capital markets domain knowledge
